fix_recommendation: Sister subagent fixes the 2 wrapper stage-impl violations so preflight_all() returns to clean state before R2 fires

summary: Commit 0916332eb 'Wire C1 Z5 routing and F3 cache surfaces' has EMPTY body — no Co-Authored-By trailer, no checkpoint discipline waiver, no journal-grade ledger reference, no premise verifier, no 6-hook wire-in declaration. Confirmed via Catalog #119 (specifically flags 0916332). Two serializer-log entries with head_after=0916332eb both ended in commit_failed:nothing-to-commit, indicating commit-swap class regression.
fix_recommendation: Backfill journal-grade ledger entry at .omx/research/c1_z5_f3_wire_in_landing_20260514.md + git notes add for commit body backfill (amend forbidden per CLAUDE.md). Strengthen Catalog #117 + Catalog #157 + Catalog #186 chain so a future empty-body commit fails preflight at the WRITE-side, not just at REVIEW time.

summary: Catalog #117 (check_subagent_commit_serializer_uses_lock) has hash-prefix matching bug. Compares short_sha (7 chars) against seen_hashes (which contains 9-char prefixes from serializer-log head_after field). Neither short-vs-9 nor full-vs-9 ever matches. Result: every commit in serializer log reported as false-positive violation. Gate has been STRUCTURALLY BROKEN since landing.
fix_recommendation: Change `if short_sha in seen_hashes or full_sha in seen_hashes` to `if any(seen.startswith(short_sha) or full_sha.startswith(seen) for seen in seen_hashes)` (~2 LOC). Add 3 dedicated tests (positive 7-vs-9-char match, negative 7-vs-7-char no-match, multi-prefix-collision boundary). Re-run #117 and re-evaluate the 50-violation count.

summary: lane_f3_backport_vqvae_pdp_20260514 (lane registered by C1+F3 subagent) trips Catalog #124 STRICT because the vq_vae token in lane id matches _REPRESENTATION_LANE_NAME_TOKENS but the lane has no lane_class=substrate_engineering / target_modes=research_substrate / research_only=true opt-out. The lane is an OPTIMIZATION wire-in, NOT a representation/codec lane.
fix_recommendation: Run `python tools/lane_maturity.py mark lane_f3_backport_vqvae_pdp_20260514 --gate <existing> --evidence ...` with notes containing 'lane_class=substrate_engineering' OR explicitly add a notes field via tooling. Catalog #124 will then accept via the substrate_engineering opt-out.

Z3 recipe substrate_z3_balle_hyperprior_bolton_modal_t4_dispatch.yaml declares video_input_strategy: cpu_thread_async_upload which is not in recognized set {per_dispatch_local_copy, readonly_mmap, shared_volume_no_contention_expected}. summary: Z3 v2 commit message claims 'A1 178162 B -> v2 173320 B (saved 4842)' but src/tac/substrates/z3_balle_hyperprior_bolton/tests/test_z3_v2_substrate.py has NO regression assertion on the 4842-byte savings. Future refactor adding fixed overhead silently degrades.

Per CLAUDE.md 'Forbidden empirical-claim-without-evidence-tag' [macOS-CPU advisory] tag is present so partial mitigation; assertion closes the loop.

summary: Z3 v2 inflate_v2.py defines local select_inflate_device function instead of importing canonical helper from tac.substrates._shared.inflate_runtime.select_inflate_device. Catalog #205 only scans submissions/*/inflate.py so this isn't currently flagged but invites drift.

summary: Five PROCEED verdicts landed in a 9-minute window (15:53:02 -> 16:02:03) with unanimous 11/11 council votes per the omnibus 7872c9f4b ledger. Per CLAUDE.md 'Council conduct': rapid unanimous consensus on infrastructure decisions is itself a finding. The Contrarian's role is to call this out. Where was the dissent?
fix_recommendation: R2 council MUST explicitly probe the unanimous-consensus pattern. Each R2 voice should attempt to falsify at least 1 PROCEED verdict from the omnibus. If R2 still cannot find dissent, that is a stronger SEAL signal — but the search must happen.
